description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. The bag is large enough to accommodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long.Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket and small pouch to hold essentialsSmall zippered compartment at the back for stowing essentialsLeather flower appliqued on the front with hanging tasslesContrast thread detailing for added attractionTwo padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfortMetal loops for the handles with stud detailing for added styleBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
